pi_items.source: Task description explicitly assigns the user the role of an ML Engineer.
O*NET classifies 'Machine Learning Engineer' as an alternate title under Data Scientists (15-2051.00). The claimed 15-1221.00 corresponds to Computer and Information Research Scientists.
The synthetic dataset and API endpoints predict patient readmission risk based on health metrics (BMI, heart rate).
SOC code prefix 15 designates the 'Computer and Mathematical Occupations' major group.

setup_task.sh and verifier scripts confirm the task involves debugging a FastAPI app, scikit-learn models, ML preprocessing (One-Hot Encoding, StandardScaler), and performance optimization (fixing a memory leak).

privileged_info_summary: The task accurately mirrors a 'Healthcare Technology' scenario by generating a synthetic dataset of 500 patient records to predict hospital readmission risk. The agent debugs a FastAPI application serving a scikit-learn Random Forest model, validating the claimed features like 'mlops', 'fastapi', 'preprocessing' (StandardScaler, One-Hot Encoding), and 'performance_optimization' (resolving a joblib.load memory leak). The O*NET occupation code 15-1221.00 (Computer and Information Research Scientists) contradicts the 'Machine Learning Engineer' role, which officially falls under Data Scientists (15-2051.00). The pass threshold is verified as 60 in the grading script.
